summary: Commit type matching logic duplicated in Get-BumpKind (lines 82–95) and New-ChangelogEntry (lines 192–215) — should be extracted to shared helper function. Git safe.directory workaround also repeated. actions/checkout@v4 uses release tag, not full SHA (acceptable for github actions but not strictest pinning). Otherwise strong: proper Set-StrictMode/error handling, pure functions enhance testability, clean module exports, sensible workflow triggers/permissions, sophisticated act-based test harness.
